summary: Iteration 3 testing: Verified all 10 features for APEX-SWARM including TinyClaw API proxy, TinyOffice at /office, 5 agent cards on /swarm, swarm controls, and sidebar nav items. Fixed a critical TinyOffice-TinyClaw proxy path duplication bug (agents/teams showed 0 before fix). Also fixed LLM NoneType response bug causing 'NoneType has no attribute startswith' cycle errors.

minor.issue: LLM response content can be None if API returns null content, causing AttributeError 'NoneType.startswith'. Fixed by returning empty string instead of None.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: TinyOffice showed 0 agents/0 teams due to path doubling in proxy. FastAPI proxy was constructing http://localhost:3777/api/api/agents instead of /api/agents. Fixed proxy to detect if path already has api/ prefix.

all_features_tested.feature: 1. Main dashboard loads at / with Neural Feed, Alpha Radar, PnL chart, stats
all_features_tested.notes: Dashboard loads with WS CONNECTED, Neural Feed (298 entries), Alpha Radar (50 targets), Cross-Chain Matrix, Equity Curve, Active Positions (PEPE/WIF/BRETT), Swarm Control

all_features_tested.feature: 2. Swarm control: start/stop swarm buttons work (POST /api/swarm/start and /api/swarm/stop)
all_features_tested.notes: Both endpoints return 200. Toggle button changes between LAUNCH SWARM / STOP SWARM correctly

all_features_tested.feature: 3. TinyClaw Agent Team page at /swarm loads with 5 agent cards and topology diagram
all_features_tested.notes: All 5 agent cards (tinyclaw, alpha_scanner, contract_sniper, execution_core, quant_mutator) confirmed via wait_for_selector. Status banner shows 5 agents deployed. Topology diagram with TINYCLAW/ALPHA/SNIPER/EXEC/QUANT nodes visible.

all_features_tested.feature: 4. TinyClaw API proxy: GET /api/tc/agents returns the 4 APEX-SWARM agents
all_features_tested.notes: Returns alpha_scanner, contract_sniper, execution_core, quant_mutator with name, model, provider fields

all_features_tested.feature: 5. TinyClaw API proxy: GET /api/tc/teams returns the apex_swarm team
all_features_tested.notes: Returns apex_swarm team with 4 agents and leader_agent=alpha_scanner

all_features_tested.feature: 6. TinyOffice accessible at /office (200 status, loads dashboard with agents and teams)
all_features_tested.notes: After fixing FastAPI proxy path doubling bug, TinyOffice now shows 4 agents and 1 team (APEX-SWARM). /office returns 200. /office/ returns 308 redirect to /office (expected Next.js behavior)

all_features_tested.feature: 7. Sidebar has OVERWATCH, TINYCLAW, POSITIONS, CONFIG, OFFICE nav items
all_features_tested.notes: All 5 nav items confirmed: nav-overwatch, nav-tinyclaw, nav-positions, nav-config, nav-office

all_features_tested.feature: 8. OFFICE nav link in sidebar navigates to /office
all_features_tested.notes: OFFICE link has href=/office, navigation works, TinyOffice loads

all_features_tested.feature: 9. GET /api/agents/status returns all 5 agents including tinyclaw orchestrator with roles and recent_logs
all_features_tested.notes: All 5 agents returned with correct roles: tinyclaw=Master Orchestrator, alpha_scanner=Market Intelligence, contract_sniper=Security Auditor, execution_core=Trade Executor, quant_mutator=Strategy Optimizer. Each has recent_logs array.

action_items: Monitor swarm cycles for any further LLM None content issues (intermittent based on OpenRouter model responses)
critical_code_review_comments: FastAPI proxy /api/tc/{path}: Now handles both /api/tc/agents (APEX-SWARM) and /api/tc/api/agents (TinyOffice) via path prefix detection - FIXED
llm_complete() returned None when LLM API returned null content field, causing AttributeError in contract_sniper cycle - FIXED
No MongoDB _id leakage issues found - all queries use projection {_id: 0}
server.py is ~849 lines - approaching the 700-line split threshold but manageable for now
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data from iteration 1: 3 positions (PEPE, WIF, BRETT), portfolio equity curve
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features from review request are now working. Key config: TinyClaw API on port 3777, TinyOffice on port 4001 with basePath=/office, FastAPI backend on 8001, Frontend on 3000. The proxy at /api/tc/* now handles both /api/tc/agents (direct) and /api/tc/api/agents (TinyOffice prefixed) patterns. Trade execution is SIMULATED (mocked). OpenRouter API calls for LLM analysis are real. Swarm cycles run every 60 seconds scanning DexScreener.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in TinyOffice .env.local was set to 'https://...com/api/tc'. TinyOffice api.ts calls apiFetch('/api/agents'), making full URL 'https://...com/api/tc/api/agents'. FastAPI proxy /api/tc/{path} extracted path='api/agents' and constructed URL 'http://localhost:3777/api/api/agents' (double /api/ prefix). TinyClaw API only serves routes under /api/, so /api/api/agents returns 404.
rca_of_issue.fix: Modified FastAPI proxy to detect when path already starts with 'api/' and skip adding the '/api/' prefix. Now: path='api/agents' → 'http://localhost:3777/api/agents'. path='agents' → 'http://localhost:3777/api/agents'. Both work correctly.
